prompt_text:
### Demographics: 46-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.3 kg; Height 158.2 cm; BMI 25.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 227mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 206mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 122mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.8kg; 9 months ago 61.9kg; 6 months ago 58.9kg; 3 months ago 56.8kg; current 63.3kg), Height (12 months ago 158.2cm; 9 months ago 158.2cm; 6 months ago 158.2cm; 3 months ago 158.2cm; current 158.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 25.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 169mg/g; 9 months ago 148mg/g; 6 months ago 144mg/g; 3 months ago 144mg/g; current 176mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 116mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 113mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 107mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
